children.heading: 1986 Compact
children.label: 1 1986 Compact
children.text: The term “1986 Compact” means the Compact of Free Association between the Government of the United States and the Governments of the Marshall Islands and the Federated States of Micronesia set forth in section 201 of the Compact of Free Association Act of 1985 ( note; ).48 U.S.C. 1901Public Law 99–239

children.heading: 2003 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact
children.label: 2 2003 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact
children.text: The term “2003 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact” means the Compact of Free Association amending the 1986 Compact entitled the “Compact of Free Association, as amended, between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia” set forth in section 201(a) of the Compact of Free Association Amendments Act of 2003 ( note; ).48 U.S.C. 1921Public Law 108–188

children.heading: 2003 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact
children.label: 3 2003 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact
children.text: The term “2003 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact” means the Compact of Free Association amending the 1986 Compact entitled “Compact of Free Association, as amended, between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands” set forth in section 201(b) of the Compact of Free Association Amendments Act of 2003 ( note; ).48 U.S.C. 1921Public Law 108–188

children.heading: 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-FSM Compact
children.label: 4 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-FSM Compact
children.text: The term “2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-FSM Compact” means the Agreement between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia to Amend the Compact of Free Association, as Amended, done at Palikir .May 23, 2023

children.heading: 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-RMI Compact
children.label: 5 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-RMI Compact
children.text: The term “2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-RMI Compact” means the Agreement between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands to Amend the Compact of Free Association, as Amended, done at Honolulu .October 16, 2023

children.heading: 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact
children.label: 6 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact
children.text: The term “2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact” means the 2003 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact [ note], as amended by the 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-FSM Compact.48 U.S.C. 1921

children.heading: 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact
children.label: 7 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact
children.text: The term “2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact” means the 2003 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact [ note], as amended by the 2023 Agreement to Amend the U.S.-RMI Compact.48 U.S.C. 1921

children.heading: 2023 U.S.-FSM Federal Programs and Services Agreement
children.label: 8 2023 U.S.-FSM Federal Programs and Services Agreement
children.text: The term “2023 U.S.-FSM Federal Programs and Services Agreement” means the 2023 Federal Programs and Services Agreement between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia, done at Washington .September 28, 2023

children.heading: 2023 U.S.-FSM Fiscal Procedures Agreement
children.label: 9 2023 U.S.-FSM Fiscal Procedures Agreement
children.text: The term “2023 U.S.-FSM Fiscal Procedures Agreement” means the Agreement Concerning Procedures for the Implementation of United States Economic Assistance provided in the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia, done at Palikir .May 23, 2023

children.heading: 2023 U.S.-FSM Trust Fund Agreement
children.label: 10 2023 U.S.-FSM Trust Fund Agreement
children.text: The term “2023 U.S.-FSM Trust Fund Agreement” means the Agreement between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia Regarding the Compact Trust Fund, done at Palikir .May 23, 2023

children.heading: 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement
children.label: 11 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement
children.text: The term “2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement” means the Agreement between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Republic of Palau Resulting From the 2023 Compact of Free Association Section 432 Review, done at Port Moresby .May 22, 2023

children.heading: 2023 U.S.-RMI Fiscal Procedures Agreement
children.label: 12 2023 U.S.-RMI Fiscal Procedures Agreement
children.text: The term “2023 U.S.-RMI Fiscal Procedures Agreement” means the Agreement Concerning Procedures for the Implementation of United States Economic Assistance Provided in the 2023 Amended Compact Between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands, done at Honolulu .October 16, 2023

children.heading: 2023 U.S.-RMI Trust Fund Agreement
children.label: 13 2023 U.S.-RMI Trust Fund Agreement
children.text: The term “2023 U.S.-RMI Trust Fund Agreement” means the Agreement between the Government of the United States of America and the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands Regarding the Compact Trust Fund, done at Honolulu .October 16, 2023

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate;

children.label: C
children.text: the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: D
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives.

children.label: A
children.text: the Federated States of Micronesia;

children.label: B
children.text: the Republic of the Marshall Islands; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Republic of Palau.

children.label: A
children.text: The 2023 U.S.-FSM Federal Programs and Services Agreement.

children.label: B
children.text: The 2023 U.S.-FSM Fiscal Procedures Agreement.

children.label: C
children.text: The 2023 U.S.-FSM Trust Fund Agreement.

children.label: D
children.text: The 2023 U.S.-RMI Fiscal Procedures Agreement.

children.label: E
children.text: The 2023 U.S.-RMI Trust Fund Agreement.

children.label: F
children.text: Any Federal Programs and Services Agreement in force between the United States and the Republic of the Marshall Islands.

children.label: G
children.text: Any Federal Programs and Services Agreement in force between the United States and the Republic of Palau.

children.label: i
children.text: the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact;

children.label: ii
children.text: the 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement; or

children.label: iii
children.text: the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact.

children.heading: U.S.-Palau Compact
children.label: 17 U.S.-Palau Compact
children.text: The term “U.S.-Palau Compact” means the Compact of Free Association between the United States and the Government of Palau set forth in ( note).section 201 of Public Law 99–65848 U.S.C. 1931
